top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE uuid IN (
    SELECT uuid
    FROM cards
    WHERE asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
);

SELECT DISTINCT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE uuid IN (
    SELECT id
    FROM cards
    WHERE asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
)
AND flavorText IS NOT NULL;

SELECT DISTINCT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE uuid IN (
    SELECT uuid
    FROM cards
    WHERE asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
);

SELECT DISTINCT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE uuid IN (
    SELECT id
    FROM cards
    WHERE asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
)
AND flavorText IS NOT NULL;

SELECT DISTINCT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE uuid IN (
    SELECT id
    FROM cards
    WHERE asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
)
AND flavorText IS NOT NULL
AND language != 'English';

SELECT DISTINCT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE uuid IN (
    SELECT uuid
    FROM cards
    WHERE asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
);

SELECT DISTINCT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE uuid IN (
    SELECT id
    FROM cards
    WHERE asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
)
AND flavorText IS NOT NULL;

SELECT DISTINCT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE uuid IN (
    SELECT id
    FROM cards
    WHERE asciiName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
)
AND flavorText != '';
